name: Cheesy Zucchini Quiche
servings: serves 6 | prep. time 10 minutes | cooking time 35-40 minutes
method: Preheat oven to 350°F (177°C). Spray a round baking pan with cooking spray.
Heat the olive oil in a large non-stick frying pan over medium heat.
Add the leeks. Cook for 5-7 minutes, seasoning with salt and pepper.
Transfer the cooked leeks to a large mixing bowl.
To the mixing bowl, add the eggs, zucchini, half and half, chives, and feta cheese. Combine well.
Transfer the mixture into the prepared baking pan. Top with the fontina cheese.
Let the quiche cool completely before serving.
